title: Data Warehouse Infrastructure Supporting Architecture
description: A layered diagram showing the core hardware and software infrastructure components that support a data warehouse architecture.
relationships: The Storage Layer is accessed by the Compute Layer
The Network Infrastructure connects all components
ETL Servers feed data into the Storage and Compute layers
BI/Reporting Servers query the Compute Layer
The Metadata Repository catalogs data across all layers
The Security & Access Control Layer envelops all other components
